title: holcus mollis subsp. triflorus
intro: Holcus mollis subsp. triflorus, also known as Darnel, is a subspecies of the common meadow-grass Holcus mollis. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Holcus mollis subsp. triflorus include treating wounds, soothing skin irritations, and reducing fever, as well as its potential in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
